1.4.20.en: Improved timezone handling and trigger reliability

1.4.21.en: Improve app store listing for Athom review

1.4.23.en: Exposed Athan times for access by other apps

1.4.27.en: Exposing athan times via web API

1.4.29.en: Add global Flow tokens for prayer times — readable by any app or flow

1.4.30.en: Fix Prayer Schedule device pairing — now appears in Add Device list

1.4.31.en: Fix Prayer Schedule device not appearing in pairing list

2.0.0.en: Removed the Prayer Schedule virtual device (driver)

2.1.2.en: Fixed memory leaks: settings listener and retry timeouts now properly cleaned up on app restart.

2.2.0.en: Added translations for Dutch, German, French, Italian, Swedish, Norwegian, Spanish, Danish, Russian, Polish and Korean — covering the app description, Flow cards, prayer names and the settings page.
